# Inline brand assets

Pre-computed base64 `data:` URIs for every bundled logo and favicon, ready to paste directly into generated HTML. The skill emits inline-only output (no `cdn.shruggie.tech/brand/logo` or `cdn.shruggie.tech/brand/favicon` URLs) so generated pages render in sandboxed environments (Claude chat artifacts, email clients, offline opens) where the CDN may be unreachable.

Each entry below pairs a placeholder token (used in `page-template.html`) with the data URI to substitute. Copy the entire `data:...` line verbatim, including the `data:` prefix. Bundled byte-identical copies of every asset live in `assets/brand/`; if the CDN ever updates, refresh both the bundled file and the data URI here.

The typography stylesheet (`https://cdn.shruggie.tech/brand/typography.css`) keeps its `@import` in the inlined `<style>` block; it is the one remote dependency the skill still uses, and the brand CSS has system-font fallback stacks for graceful degradation if it fails to load.

## Placeholder index

| Placeholder | Source asset |
|---|---|
| `{{LOGO_DARKBG_DATA_URI}}` | logo-darkbg.png |
| `{{LOGO_LIGHTBG_DATA_URI}}` | logo-lightbg.png |
| `{{OG_IMAGE_DATA_URI}}` | github-social-share.png |
| `{{FAVICON_ICO_DATA_URI}}` | icon.ico |
| `{{FAVICON_192_DATA_URI}}` | icon-192.png |
| `{{FAVICON_256_DATA_URI}}` | icon-256.png |
| `{{FAVICON_512_DATA_URI}}` | icon-512.png |
| `{{FAVICON_144_DATA_URI}}` | icon-144.png |
| `{{FAVICON_92_DATA_URI}}` | icon-92.png |
| `{{FAVICON_64_DATA_URI}}` | icon-64.png |

## logo-darkbg

- Token: `{{LOGO_DARKBG_DATA_URI}}`
- Source: `https://cdn.shruggie.tech/brand/logo/logo-darkbg.png`
- Bundled: `assets/brand/logo/logo-darkbg.png`
- Use: site-header logo on dark backgrounds (default).

Data URI:

data:image/png;base64,

## logo-lightbg

- Token: `{{LOGO_LIGHTBG_DATA_URI}}`
- Source: `https://cdn.shruggie.tech/brand/logo/logo-lightbg.png`
- Bundled: `assets/brand/logo/logo-lightbg.png`
- Use: site-header logo on light or near-white backgrounds (light-default pages).

Data URI:

data:image/png;base64,

## github-social-share

- Token: `{{OG_IMAGE_DATA_URI}}`
- Source: `https://cdn.shruggie.tech/brand/logo/github-social-share.png`
- Bundled: `assets/brand/logo/github-social-share.png`
- Use: Open Graph and Twitter card image. Substitute only if the user supplies a custom social image.

Data URI:

data:image/png;base64,

## icon.ico

- Token: `{{FAVICON_ICO_DATA_URI}}`
- Source: `https://cdn.shruggie.tech/brand/favicon/icon.ico`
- Bundled: `assets/brand/favicon/icon.ico`
- Use: primary favicon for the main rel=icon link.

Data URI:

data:image/x-icon;base64,

## icon-192

- Token: `{{FAVICON_192_DATA_URI}}`
- Source: `https://cdn.shruggie.tech/brand/favicon/icon-192.png`
- Bundled: `assets/brand/favicon/icon-192.png`
- Use: 192px PNG favicon, PWA manifest icon.

Data URI:

data:image/png;base64,

## icon-256

- Token: `{{FAVICON_256_DATA_URI}}`
- Source: `https://cdn.shruggie.tech/brand/favicon/icon-256.png`
- Bundled: `assets/brand/favicon/icon-256.png`
- Use: 256px PNG, Apple touch icon slot.

Data URI:

data:image/png;base64,

## icon-512

- Token: `{{FAVICON_512_DATA_URI}}`
- Source: `https://cdn.shruggie.tech/brand/favicon/icon-512.png`
- Bundled: `assets/brand/favicon/icon-512.png`
- Use: 512px PNG, PWA splash.

Data URI:

data:image/png;base64,

## icon-144

- Token: `{{FAVICON_144_DATA_URI}}`
- Source: `https://cdn.shruggie.tech/brand/favicon/icon-144.png`
- Bundled: `assets/brand/favicon/icon-144.png`
- Use: 144px PNG, legacy Windows tile.

Data URI:

data:image/png;base64,

## icon-92

- Token: `{{FAVICON_92_DATA_URI}}`
- Source: `https://cdn.shruggie.tech/brand/favicon/icon-92.png`
- Bundled: `assets/brand/favicon/icon-92.png`
- Use: 92px PNG, smaller-size manifest slot.

Data URI:

data:image/png;base64,

## icon-64

- Token: `{{FAVICON_64_DATA_URI}}`
- Source: `https://cdn.shruggie.tech/brand/favicon/icon-64.png`
- Bundled: `assets/brand/favicon/icon-64.png`
- Use: 64px PNG, small-screen favicon variant.

Data URI:

data:image/png;base64,
